final_choice.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets

variables.notes: OK. Explicit operating D&A is presented as separate line-item(s) outside the selected XSGA bucket ('Employee benefits' + 'Other operating expenses'), so it should be added separately rather than assumed embedded. The summary row 'Depreciation and amortization' appears to include impairment charges because it reconciles with impairment sub-rows, so it is not used. Selected only the clean operating D&A components and excluded impairment rows.
